prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy character portrait of a noble elven paladin princess standing in a medieval castle courtyard. She is a young adult woman with fair porcelain skin, delicate facial features, blue-gray eyes, and a calm, slightly melancholic expression, looking directly at the viewer. She has very long flowing platinum blonde hair with a center part, loose strands blowing in the wind, one side braid, and small silver hair ornaments. Dress her in elegant high-fantasy armor: polished silver shoulder plates, segmented metal gauntlets and forearm armor, thigh armor, a white hooded cloak draped over both shoulders, fitted white trousers, a black leather armored corset bodice with ornate gold filigree trim, and crossed leather sword belts at the waist. Include one sheathed longsword hanging at her hip with the hilt visible. The composition is a three-quarter full-body view from mid-thigh upward, centered, heroic but graceful, with shallow depth of field. Background: a grand pale stone fantasy castle with tall towers and spires, banners, misty atmosphere, and soft distant figures or flags, all blurred by bokeh. Lighting is natural cool daylight with soft rim light on the hair and reflective highlights on the armor, realistic skin shading, highly detailed fabric and metal textures. Visual style: ultra-detailed semi-realistic anime fantasy illustration, cinematic realism, refined beauty, elegant knight aesthetic, high resolution, soft atmospheric haze, no text, no watermark, no extra characters in focus.
